guardrails: ADR-0012 is Proposed and cannot authorize accepted spec, schema, API, runtime, Desktop, dependency, packaging, or generated-type changes.
W1.5.205 records the FR-015 snapshot ledger projection and restore/continue contract direction only.
FR-015 remains partial_runtime_bridge_requires_followup; no FR item is accepted and EXIT-P1-1 remains not_ready.
Desktop must not read .agent-workflow/snapshots/snapshots.jsonl directly before an accepted runtime projection exists.
Desktop must not perform Git restore directly; restore semantics must be runtime-owned and lock-aware before implementation.

Evidence and runner output must remain metadata-only and exclude raw prompts, raw model output, uploaded-file bytes, response bodies, artifact bodies, raw workflow change summaries, raw refs payloads, full paths, secure paths, cache paths, and output directory values.
Standing dirty CLAUDE.md remains out of slice commits unless explicitly scoped by the user.

current_decision_state.reason: FR-015 still lacks an accepted snapshot ledger projection and restore/continue contract; W1.5.205 stops at Proposed ADR plus gate.

required_human_decision.prompt: Accept ADR-0012 as the contract authority for FR-015 snapshot ledger projection, restore-to-snapshot, and continue semantics?
on_acceptance_next_steps: Update docs/03_decisions/0012-fr015-snapshot-ledger-restore-contract.md Status to Accepted and add Proposed -> Accepted history.
Update docs/03_decisions/README.md ADR-0012 status to Accepted.
Update accepted API/spec/schema contract for snapshot ledger projection before Desktop surfaces snapshots/snapshots.jsonl.
Update accepted restore-to-snapshot and continue semantics before runtime or Desktop implementation.
Regenerate derived schema types if a schema model changes.
Only then implement runtime/Desktop behavior and A4 evidence for FR-015.
on_rejection_next_steps: Keep ADR-0012 Proposed or mark it Superseded by a replacement ADR.
Do not modify accepted specs or implementation for FR-015 restore/continue using ADR-0012.

snapshot_ledger_projection.sanitization_boundary: Snapshot refs must remain identifier-only metadata and must not carry prompt text, model output, uploaded-file bytes, response bodies, secure paths, cache paths, output directory values, or raw local filesystem paths.

restore_to_snapshot.proposed_action: runtime-owned restore against a ledger snapshot_id
restore_to_snapshot.continue_semantics: Restore must not automatically continue execution; continue after restore is an explicit follow-up action after restored state is visible and validated.

accepted_contract_anchors.reason: Accepted runtime snapshot ledger storage location.

forbidden_premature_changes: Do not add GET /cw/v1/workflows/{workflow_id}/snapshots to accepted API spec while ADR-0012 is Proposed.
Do not add restore or continue snapshot endpoints to accepted API spec while ADR-0012 is Proposed.
Do not add package schema models or generated schema types for snapshot restore while ADR-0012 is Proposed.
Do not implement runtime handlers, Desktop commands, preload/main Git actions, or renderer restore UI while ADR-0012 is Proposed.
Do not mark FR-015 accepted, A4 accepted, or EXIT-P1-1 ready from this gate.

next_recommended_slices.title: FR-015 snapshot restore accepted contract delta
next_recommended_slices.reason: Only after ADR-0012 acceptance may accepted API/spec/schema changes define snapshot ledger projection and restore/continue semantics.
